description_long: This is a patchwork stuffed bear toy with a soft, rounded body and limbs. Its surface is composed of various fabric panels in shades of blue and pink, joined together with visible white cross-stitching. The bear has a large, oval pink patch on its belly and a matching pink snout, both contrasting with the blue tones of the rest of its body. Its face features two black button-like eyes and a small black nose, giving it a gentle and friendly appearance. The ears are rounded and slightly protruding, while the arms and legs are short and stubby, adding to its cuddly look. The overall texture appears to be soft and slightly ribbed, typical of plush toys designed for children.
description: A patchwork stuffed bear toy with blue and pink fabric panels, cross-stitching, and button-like eyes. It has a soft, rounded body and a friendly, gentle face.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bear's face, pink snout, belly patch, and both arms and legs clearly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the bear's profile, ear, nose, and the curvature of its body and limbs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, body, and arms, with visible stitching and no facial features.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the bear's profile, similar to the left, with the ear, nose, and body curvature visible.
attribute_facial_expression: The bear has a neutral, gentle facial expression with round black eyes and a small, simple mouth. Its features give it a friendly and approachable look.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Sitting upright with arms slightly outstretched and legs spread apart, head facing forward.
